channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lights are all broken, 13th April
item.description:
All lights in the alleyway near 48 lynmouth road n16 leading to lampard grove are all broken. Its pitch dark and very dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London

item.description:
More junk in the usual spot. Please install a camera as this has become a fly tipping area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: No more need for barriers., 13th April
item.description:
No more need for barriers as there is nothing to protect. Only a tree support post inside the barriers. If removed along with the broken paving, would allow water to flow in the gutter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: 275 Kilburn lane, 13th April
item.description:
This area has been dug up for weeks and no work has been done for weeks, the blue barriers keep falling over and it’s dangerous to walk around. Is this being fixed soon?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Bike Rack, 13th April
item.description:
Junctions Earls street Crown Place.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earl Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New "Keep Clear" zone at Brecknock/Anson/Ospringe intersection, 13th April
item.description:
Context: At peak hours, the Tuffnel park interesection creates long car queues on Brecknock road that go past Ospringe road / Anson road. Queues also occasionally come from the other direction too when a bus is stopped and blocking traffic. Problem: Cars crossing between Ospringe road and Anson road are often blocked from crossing due to these queues. This has been the case for several years already and the frequency varies depending on various factors (road works, hour of the day, weather, etc.) Proposed solution: Adding a "Keep Clear" zone at this intersection would allow cars to flow freely between Ospringe road and Anson road even when there are long queues on Brecknock road. The same should be considered at the intersection of Brecknock road and Lady Margaret road. Thank you for your consideration.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6 victoria mews, 13th April
item.description:
DIY waste opposite 6 victoria mews

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Garden waste bin not emptied - road missed, 13th April
item.description:
Photos show garden waste bin ready for collection since Sunday afternoon (RingVideo doorbell camera). Neighbours informed me that vehicle did not drive down our part of the road. System says bin not presented which is clearly incorrect. System also says can’t report as missed which is unacceptable as the bin was there since 4.20pm yesterday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morgan Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped domestic waste, 13th April
item.description:
Black household waste has been dumped on the foot way. It’s been there for a few weeks now and it’s started to be added to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
